messages.content: 我这个是要放到论文里面的，你这个像是webpage用的

明白了！我来帮你做一个适合放到论文里的学术风格流程图。我会用更简洁、专业的样式，并导出为适合论文使用的格式。

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
from matplotlib.patches import FancyBboxPatch, FancyArrowPatch
import numpy as np

# 设置字体以支持中文
plt.rcParams['font.sans-serif'] = ['Arial Unicode MS', 'SimHei', 'DejaVu Sans']
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False
plt.rcParams['font.size'] = 11

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(14, 8))
fig.patch.set_facecolor('white')

def draw_box(ax, x, y, width, height, text, box_color='lightblue', text_color='black', fontsize=11, fontweight='normal'):
    """绘制圆角矩形框"""
    box = FancyBboxPatch((x - width/2, y - height/2), width, height,
                          boxstyle="round,pad=0.05", 
                          edgecolor='black', facecolor=box_color,
                          linewidth=1.5, zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(box)
    ax.text(x, y, text, ha='center', va='center', 
            fontsize=fontsize, fontweight=fontweight, color=text_color, zorder=3)

def draw_arrow(ax, x1, y1, x2, y2, style='->', color='black'):
    """绘制箭头"""
    arrow = FancyArrowPatch((x1, y1), (x2, y2),
                           arrowstyle=style, color=color,
                           linewidth=2, mutation_scale=20, zorder=1)
    ax.add_patch(arrow)

def draw_formula_box(ax, x, y, width, height, text, fontsize=10):
    """绘制公式框"""
    box = FancyBboxPatch((x - width/2, y - height/2), width, height,
                          boxstyle="round,pad=0.03", 
                          edgecolor='gray', facecolor='white',
                          linewidth=1, linestyle='--', zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(box)
    ax.text(x, y, text, ha='center', va='center', 
            fontsize=fontsize, style='italic', zorder=3)

# ==================== Muon ====================
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax1.axis('off')
ax1.set_title('Muon', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

draw_box(ax1, 5, 8.5, 2.5, 0.8, 'M', box_color='#E8EAF6')
draw_arrow(ax1, 5, 8.1, 5, 6.9)
draw_box(ax1, 5, 6.2, 2.5, 0.8, 'NS 迭代', box_color='#C5CAE9')
draw_arrow(ax1, 5, 5.8, 5, 4.7)
draw_box(ax1, 5, 4.0, 2.5, 0.8, 'Update', box_color='#9FA8DA')

# ==================== Shampoo/Soap ====================
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax2.axis('off')
ax2.set_title('Shampoo/Soap', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

draw_box(ax2, 5, 8.5, 2.5, 0.8, 'M', box_color='#E8EAF6')
draw_arrow(ax2, 5, 8.1, 5, 7.6)

# 公式框
draw_formula_box(ax2, 5, 7.2, 4, 0.6, r'$L = GG^T$,   $R = G^TG$')
draw_arrow(ax2, 5, 6.9, 5, 6.4)

draw_box(ax2, 5, 6.0, 3.5, 0.7, r'$L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}}$', 
         box_color='#C5CAE9', fontsize=10)
draw_arrow(ax2, 5, 5.65, 5, 5.1)

# SOAP 缩放框
draw_box(ax2, 5, 4.4, 4.2, 1.1, 
         r'$\frac{\|M_{adam}\|}{\|L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}}\|} \cdot (L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}})$',
         box_color='#FFF9C4', fontsize=9)

# 注释框
note_box = FancyBboxPatch((6.5, 3.8), 3.2, 1.0,
                          boxstyle="round,pad=0.05", 
                          edgecolor='orange', facecolor='#FFF9C4',
                          linewidth=1.5, zorder=2)
ax2.add_patch(note_box)
ax2.text(8.1, 4.5, 'SOAP:', ha='center', va='center', 
         fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(8.1, 4.2, '额外维护一套', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8)
ax2.text(8.1, 3.95, 'Adam 的步长', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8)

# 循环箭头
draw_arrow(ax2, 6.5, 4.3, 6.5, 5.8, style='->', color='gray')
draw_arrow(ax2, 6.5, 5.8, 6.2, 6.0, style='->', color='gray')

draw_arrow(ax2, 5, 3.85, 5, 3.4)
draw_box(ax2, 5, 2.9, 2.5, 0.8, 'Update', box_color='#9FA8DA')

# ==================== Mousse ====================
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax3.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax3.axis('off')
ax3.set_title('Mousse', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

draw_box(ax3, 5, 8.5, 2.5, 0.8, 'M', box_color='#E8EAF6')
draw_arrow(ax3, 5, 8.1, 5, 7.6)

draw_formula_box(ax3, 5, 7.2, 4, 0.6, r'$L = GG^T$,   $R = G^TG$')
draw_arrow(ax3, 5, 6.9, 5, 6.4)

draw_box(ax3, 5, 6.0, 3.5, 0.7, r'$L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}}$', 
         box_color='#C5CAE9', fontsize=10)
draw_arrow(ax3, 5, 5.65, 5, 5.2)

draw_box(ax3, 5, 4.8, 2.5, 0.8, 'NS 迭代', box_color='#C5CAE9')
draw_arrow(ax3, 5, 4.4, 5, 3.9)

draw_box(ax3, 5, 3.5, 3.5, 0.7, r'$L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}}$', 
         box_color='#C5CAE9', fontsize=10)
draw_arrow(ax3, 5, 3.15, 5, 2.7)

draw_box(ax3, 5, 2.2, 2.5, 0.8, 'Update', box_color='#9FA8DA')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('optimizer_comparison.pdf', dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight', facecolor='white')
plt.savefig('optimizer_comparison.png', dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight', facecolor='white')
plt.show()

print("图片已保存为 optimizer_comparison.pdf 和 optimizer_comparison.png")
```

**如果你更喜欢 LaTeX/TikZ 格式（推荐用于论文）：**

```latex
\documentclass[border=5pt]{standalone}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{shapes.geometric, arrows.meta, positioning, fit}

\tikzset{
    box/.style={rectangle, rounded corners, minimum width=3cm, minimum height=0.8cm, 
                text centered, draw=black, thick, fill=blue!10},
    process/.style={box, fill=blue!20},
    update/.style={box, fill=blue!30},
    formula/.style={rectangle, rounded corners, minimum width=4cm, minimum height=0.6cm,
                    text centered, draw=gray, dashed, fill=white},
    note/.style={rectangle, rounded corners, minimum width=3cm, minimum height=1cm,
                 text centered, draw=orange, thick, fill=yellow!20},
    arrow/.style={thick,-{Stealth[length=3mm]}}
}

\begin{document}
\begin{tikzpicture}[node distance=0.8cm]

% ===== Muon =====
\node[box] (m1) at (0,0) {M};
\node[process, below=of m1] (ns1) {NS 迭代};
\node[update, below=of ns1] (up1) {Update};
\node[above=0.5cm of m1, font=\large\bfseries] {Muon};

\draw[arrow] (m1) -- (ns1);
\draw[arrow] (ns1) -- (up1);

% ===== Shampoo/Soap =====
\node[box] (m2) at (6,0) {M};
\node[formula, below=of m2] (form2) {$L = GG^T$, \quad $R = G^TG$};
\node[process, below=of form2] (pre2) {$L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}}$};
\node[process, below=1.2cm of pre2, minimum height=1.2cm] (scale2) {
    $\displaystyle\frac{\|M_{adam}\|}{\|L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}}\|} \cdot (L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}})$};
\node[update, below=1.2cm of scale2] (up2) {Update};
\node[above=0.5cm of m2, font=\large\bfseries] {Shampoo/Soap};

\node[note, right=0.5cm of scale2, align=center] (note2) {
    \textbf{SOAP:}\\
    额外维护一套\\
    Adam 的步长
};

\draw[arrow] (m2) -- (form2);
\draw[arrow] (form2) -- (pre2);
\draw[arrow] (pre2) -- (scale2);
\draw[arrow] (scale2) -- (up2);
\draw[arrow, gray, ->] (note2.west) -- (scale2.east);
\draw[arrow, gray, ->] (scale2.east) to[out=0, in=0, looseness=2] (pre2.east);

% ===== Mousse =====
\node[box] (m3) at (12,0) {M};
\node[formula, below=of m3] (form3) {$L = GG^T$, \quad $R = G^TG$};
\node[process, below=of form3] (pre3a) {$L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}}$};
\node[process, below=of pre3a] (ns3) {NS 迭代};
\node[process, below=of ns3] (pre3b) {$L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}}$};
\node[update, below=of pre3b] (up3) {Update};
\node[above=0.5cm of m3, font=\large\bfseries] {Mousse};

\draw[arrow] (m3) -- (form3);
\draw[arrow] (form3) -- (pre3a);
\draw[arrow] (pre3a) -- (ns3);
\draw[arrow] (ns3) -- (pre3b);
\draw[arrow] (pre3b) -- (up3);

\end{tikzpicture}
\end{document}
```

**两种方案对比：**

1. **Python (Matplotlib)** - 快速生成，可直接导出高质量 PDF/PNG
2. **LaTeX (TikZ)** - 论文标准，矢量图形，完美集成到 LaTeX 文档

运行 Python 代码会生成适合论文使用的图片。如果你的论文是用 LaTeX 写的，TikZ 版本会更好！

需要我调整颜色、布局或添加其他元素吗？
把流程图横过来，每个optimizer占一行。  不要仅使用文本框，用一些简单的矢量图来表达 Newton-Schulz迭代，或者是 谱分解 的过程  体现出方法之间的相关与不同，例如在 Mousse 中，体现出它并不需要 Soap 中的adamw 的二阶矩

好的！我来创建一个横向的、更具视觉表现力的流程图，用矢量图形来展示算法的内部机制。

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
from matplotlib.patches import FancyBboxPatch, FancyArrowPatch, Circle, Wedge, Rectangle, Ellipse
from matplotlib.patches import Arc
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.sans-serif'] = ['Arial Unicode MS', 'SimHei', 'DejaVu Sans']
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False
plt.rcParams['font.size'] = 10

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(16, 10))
fig.patch.set_facecolor('white')

def draw_box(ax, x, y, width, height, text, box_color='lightblue', text_color='black', 
             fontsize=10, fontweight='normal', alpha=1.0):
    """绘制圆角矩形框"""
    box = FancyBboxPatch((x - width/2, y - height/2), width, height,
                          boxstyle="round,pad=0.05", 
                          edgecolor='black', facecolor=box_color,
                          linewidth=1.5, alpha=alpha, zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(box)
    ax.text(x, y, text, ha='center', va='center', 
            fontsize=fontsize, fontweight=fontweight, color=text_color, zorder=3)

def draw_arrow(ax, x1, y1, x2, y2, style='->', color='black', linewidth=2):
    """绘制箭头"""
    arrow = FancyArrowPatch((x1, y1), (x2, y2),
                           arrowstyle=style, color=color,
                           linewidth=linewidth, mutation_scale=15, zorder=1)
    ax.add_patch(arrow)

def draw_matrix(ax, x, y, size=0.4, color='#B3E5FC', label=''):
    """绘制矩阵图标"""
    # 外框
    rect = Rectangle((x-size/2, y-size/2), size, size, 
                     facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    # 内部网格
    for i in range(1, 3):
        ax.plot([x-size/2, x+size/2], [y-size/2+i*size/3, y-size/2+i*size/3], 
                'k-', linewidth=0.5, zorder=3)
        ax.plot([x-size/2+i*size/3, x-size/2+i*size/3], [y-size/2, y+size/2], 
                'k-', linewidth=0.5, zorder=3)
    if label:
        ax.text(x, y-size/2-0.15, label, ha='center', va='top', fontsize=9, 
                fontweight='bold', zorder=3)

def draw_eigendecomp(ax, x, y, size=0.6):
    """绘制特征分解图标 (谱分解)"""
    # 左矩阵
    draw_matrix(ax, x-size*0.8, y, size*0.6, color='#FFE082', label='')
    # 对角矩阵 (中间)
    rect = Rectangle((x-size*0.3, y-size*0.3), size*0.6, size*0.6,
                     facecolor='#CE93D8', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    # 对角线
    ax.plot([x-size*0.3, x+size*0.3], [y-size*0.3, y+size*0.3], 
            'k-', linewidth=2, zorder=3)
    ax.text(x, y+size*0.5, r'$\Lambda$', ha='center', fontsize=11, 
            fontweight='bold', zorder=3)
    # 右矩阵
    draw_matrix(ax, x+size*0.8, y, size*0.6, color='#FFE082', label='')
    
def draw_ns_iteration(ax, x, y, size=0.5):
    """绘制Newton-Schulz迭代图标 (循环箭头)"""
    # 中心矩阵
    draw_matrix(ax, x, y, size*0.7, color='#A5D6A7', label='')
    
    # 循环箭头
    theta1 = np.linspace(0.3*np.pi, 1.7*np.pi, 50)
    r = size*0.8
    arc_x = x + r * np.cos(theta1)
    arc_y = y + r * np.sin(theta1)
    ax.plot(arc_x, arc_y, 'b-', linewidth=2.5, zorder=3)
    
    # 箭头头部
    arrow_head = mpatches.FancyArrow(arc_x[-5], arc_y[-5], 
                                     arc_x[-1]-arc_x[-5], arc_y[-1]-arc_y[-5],
                                     width=0.08, head_width=0.15, head_length=0.1,
                                     facecolor='blue', edgecolor='blue', zorder=3)
    ax.add_patch(arrow_head)
    
    # 标注迭代
    ax.text(x, y+size*1.1, 'NS Iter', ha='center', fontsize=9, 
            style='italic', color='blue', zorder=3)

def draw_adamw_moment(ax, x, y, size=0.4):
    """绘制AdamW二阶矩图标"""
    # 背景框
    rect = FancyBboxPatch((x-size*0.6, y-size*0.5), size*1.2, size,
                          boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
                          facecolor='#FFECB3', edgecolor='#FF6F00', 
                          linewidth=2, linestyle='--', zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    ax.text(x, y+0.05, r'$v_t$', ha='center', fontsize=11, 
            fontweight='bold', color='#E65100', zorder=3)
    ax.text(x, y-0.2, 'Adam', ha='center', fontsize=8, 
            style='italic', color='#E65100', zorder=3)

def draw_cross(ax, x, y, size=0.3, color='red'):
    """绘制叉号表示不需要"""
    linewidth = 3
    ax.plot([x-size/2, x+size/2], [y-size/2, y+size/2], 
            color=color, linewidth=linewidth, zorder=4)
    ax.plot([x-size/2, x+size/2], [y+size/2, y-size/2], 
            color=color, linewidth=linewidth, zorder=4)

# ==================== Muon (第一行) ====================
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 16)
ax1.set_ylim(-0.5, 1.5)
ax1.axis('off')
ax1.text(-0.5, 0.5, 'Muon', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', va='center', 
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#E8EAF6', edgecolor='black', linewidth=2))

x_pos = 1.5
# 输入矩阵
draw_matrix(ax1, x_pos, 0.5, size=0.5, color='#B3E5FC', label='M')
x_pos += 1.0

draw_arrow(ax1, x_pos-0.3, 0.5, x_pos+0.3, 0.5)
x_pos += 1.2

# NS迭代
draw_ns_iteration(ax1, x_pos, 0.5, size=0.5)
x_pos += 1.5

draw_arrow(ax1, x_pos-0.5, 0.5, x_pos+0.3, 0.5)
x_pos += 1.0

# 输出
draw_box(ax1, x_pos, 0.5, 1.2, 0.5, 'Update', box_color='#9FA8DA', fontweight='bold')

# 标注：最简单的方法
ax1.text(8, 1.2, '✓ 最简洁：直接NS迭代', fontsize=9, style='italic', color='green',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#E8F5E9', alpha=0.7))

# ==================== Shampoo/Soap (第二行) ====================
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_xlim(0, 16)
ax2.set_ylim(-0.5, 1.5)
ax2.axis('off')
ax2.text(-0.5, 0.5, 'Shampoo/\nSoap', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', va='center',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#FFF9C4', edgecolor='black', linewidth=2))

x_pos = 1.5
# 输入矩阵
draw_matrix(ax2, x_pos, 0.5, size=0.5, color='#B3E5FC', label='M')
x_pos += 1.0

draw_arrow(ax2, x_pos-0.3, 0.5, x_pos+0.3, 0.5)
x_pos += 1.0

# 计算L和R (谱分解)
ax2.text(x_pos, 1.0, r'$L=GG^T, R=G^TG$', fontsize=9, ha='center',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', facecolor='white', edgecolor='gray', linestyle='--'))
draw_eigendecomp(ax2, x_pos, 0.3, size=0.6)
x_pos += 1.8

draw_arrow(ax2, x_pos-0.8, 0.3, x_pos+0.2, 0.3)
x_pos += 0.8

# Preconditioning
draw_box(ax2, x_pos, 0.5, 1.8, 0.5, r'$L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}}$', 
         box_color='#C5CAE9', fontsize=9)
x_pos += 1.5

draw_arrow(ax2, x_pos-0.4, 0.5, x_pos+0.3, 0.5)
x_pos += 1.0

# AdamW二阶矩 (SOAP特有)
draw_adamw_moment(ax2, x_pos, 0.5, size=0.5)
ax2.text(x_pos, -0.3, '缩放', fontsize=8, ha='center', style='italic')
x_pos += 1.2

draw_arrow(ax2, x_pos-0.5, 0.5, x_pos+0.3, 0.5)
x_pos += 1.0

# 输出
draw_box(ax2, x_pos, 0.5, 1.2, 0.5, 'Update', box_color='#9FA8DA', fontweight='bold')

# 标注
ax2.text(8, 1.2, '⚠ 需要额外维护 AdamW 的二阶矩', fontsize=9, style='italic', color='#F57C00',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#FFF3E0', alpha=0.7))

# ==================== Mousse (第三行) ====================
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.set_xlim(0, 16)
ax3.set_ylim(-0.5, 1.5)
ax3.axis('off')
ax3.text(-0.5, 0.5, 'Mousse', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', va='center',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#E1F5FE', edgecolor='black', linewidth=2))

x_pos = 1.5
# 输入矩阵
draw_matrix(ax3, x_pos, 0.5, size=0.5, color='#B3E5FC', label='M')
x_pos += 1.0

draw_arrow(ax3, x_pos-0.3, 0.5, x_pos+0.3, 0.5)
x_pos += 1.0

# 计算L和R (谱分解)
ax3.text(x_pos, 1.0, r'$L=GG^T, R=G^TG$', fontsize=9, ha='center',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', facecolor='white', edgecolor='gray', linestyle='--'))
draw_eigendecomp(ax3, x_pos, 0.3, size=0.6)
x_pos += 1.8

draw_arrow(ax3, x_pos-0.8, 0.3, x_pos+0.2, 0.3)
x_pos += 0.8

# Preconditioning
draw_box(ax3, x_pos, 0.5, 1.8, 0.5, r'$L^{-\frac{1}{4}}MR^{-\frac{1}{4}}$', 
         box_color='#C5CAE9', fontsize=9)
x_pos += 1.5

draw_arrow(ax3, x_pos-0.4, 0.5, x_pos+0.3, 0.5)
x_pos += 0.8

# NS迭代
draw_ns_iteration(ax3, x_pos, 0.5, size=0.5)
x_pos += 1.3

# 显示不需要AdamW
draw_adamw_moment(ax3, x_pos, 0.8, size=0.4)
draw_cross(ax3, x_pos, 0.8, size=0.35, color='red')
ax3.text(x_pos, 0.1, '不需要!', fontsize=8, ha='center', 
         fontweight='bold', color='red')
x_pos += 0.3

draw_arrow(ax3, x_pos-0.2, 0.5, x_pos+0.5, 0.5)
x_pos += 1.2

# 输出
draw_box(ax3, x_pos, 0.5, 1.2, 0.5, 'Update', box_color='#9FA8DA', fontweight='bold')

# 标注
ax3.text(8, 1.2, '✓ 最优：预处理 + NS迭代，无需二阶矩', fontsize=9, style='italic', color='green',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#E8F5E9', alpha=0.7))

# 添加整体说明
fig.text(0.5, 0.96, '优化器算法流程对比', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold', ha='center')

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.95])
plt.savefig('optimizer_comparison_horizontal.pdf', dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight', facecolor='white')
plt.savefig('optimizer_comparison_horizontal.png', dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight', facecolor='white')
plt.show()

print("图片已保存！")
```

**主要改进：**

1. **横向布局** - 每个优化器占一行，更容易对比
2. **矢量图标**：
   - 🔷 **矩阵图标** - 网格表示矩阵结构
   - 🔄 **NS迭代** - 循环箭头表示迭代过程
   - 🌈 **谱分解** - 对角矩阵（Λ）和特征向量矩阵
   - ⚠️ **AdamW二阶矩** - 虚线框标注
   - ❌ **叉号** - 表示Mousse不需要二阶矩

3. **视觉对比**：
   - Muon：简单直接，只有NS迭代
   - Soap：复杂，需要谱分解 + AdamW二阶矩
   - Mousse：结合优势，谱分解 + NS迭代，明确标注不需要二阶矩

4. **颜色编码**：
   - 蓝色系 - 输入/矩阵
   - 紫色 - 中间处理
   - 绿色 - NS迭代
   - 橙色 - AdamW相关
   - 深蓝 - 最终输出

这样的设计更符合论文需求，清晰展示了三种方法的异同！需要调整细节吗？
ns 迭代不是简单的旋转，它应该是谱归一化，你能想到一种更好的表现形式吗？

你说得对！Newton-Schulz迭代本质上是在做谱归一化，让矩阵的奇异值趋向于1。让我重新设计一个更准确的视觉表现：

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
from matplotlib.patches import FancyBboxPatch, FancyArrowPatch, Circle, Wedge, Rectangle, Ellipse, Polygon
from matplotlib.patches import Arc
import numpy as np

plt.rcParams['font.sans-serif'] = ['Arial Unicode MS', 'SimHei', 'DejaVu Sans']
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False
plt.rcParams['font.size'] = 10

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(16, 10))
fig.patch.set_facecolor('white')

def draw_box(ax, x, y, width, height, text, box_color='lightblue', text_color='black', 
             fontsize=10, fontweight='normal', alpha=1.0):
    """绘制圆角矩形框"""
    box = FancyBboxPatch((x - width/2, y - height/2), width, height,
                          boxstyle="round,pad=0.05", 
                          edgecolor='black', facecolor=box_color,
                          linewidth=1.5, alpha=alpha, zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(box)
    ax.text(x, y, text, ha='center', va='center', 
            fontsize=fontsize, fontweight=fontweight, color=text_color, zorder=3)

def draw_arrow(ax, x1, y1, x2, y2, style='->', color='black', linewidth=2):
    """绘制箭头"""
    arrow = FancyArrowPatch((x1, y1), (x2, y2),
                           arrowstyle=style, color=color,
                           linewidth=linewidth, mutation_scale=15, zorder=1)
    ax.add_patch(arrow)

def draw_matrix(ax, x, y, size=0.4, color='#B3E5FC', label=''):
    """绘制矩阵图标"""
    rect = Rectangle((x-size/2, y-size/2), size, size, 
                     facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    for i in range(1, 3):
        ax.plot([x-size/2, x+size/2], [y-size/2+i*size/3, y-size/2+i*size/3], 
                'k-', linewidth=0.5, zorder=3)
        ax.plot([x-size/2+i*size/3, x-size/2+i*size/3], [y-size/2, y+size/2], 
                'k-', linewidth=0.5, zorder=3)
    if label:
        ax.text(x, y-size/2-0.15, label, ha='center', va='top', fontsize=9, 
                fontweight='bold', zorder=3)

def draw_eigendecomp(ax, x, y, size=0.6):
    """绘制特征分解图标"""
    # 左矩阵 U
    draw_matrix(ax, x-size*0.8, y, size*0.6, color='#FFE082', label='')
    ax.text(x-size*0.8, y-size*0.5, 'U', ha='center', fontsize=9, 
            fontweight='bold', style='italic')
    
    # 对角矩阵 Σ (中间)
    rect = Rectangle((x-size*0.3, y-size*0.3), size*0.6, size*0.6,
                     facecolor='#CE93D8', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    ax.plot([x-size*0.3, x+size*0.3], [y-size*0.3, y+size*0.3], 
            'k-', linewidth=2, zorder=3)
    ax.text(x, y+size*0.5, r'$\Sigma
```, ha='center', fontsize=11, 
            fontweight='bold', zorder=3)
    
    # 右矩阵 V^T
    draw_matrix(ax, x+size*0.8, y, size*0.6, color='#FFE082', label='')
    ax.text(x+size*0.8, y-size*0.5, r'$V^T
```, ha='center', fontsize=9, 
            fontweight='bold', style='italic')

def draw_spectrum_normalization(ax, x, y, size=0.6):
    """绘制谱归一化过程 - 显示奇异值从分散到集中"""
    width = size * 1.5
    height = size * 0.9
    
    # 左侧：不均匀的谱
    left_x = x - width/3
    # 绘制坐标轴
    ax.plot([left_x-size*0.4, left_x+size*0.4], [y-height/2, y-height/2], 
            'k-', linewidth=1, zorder=2)
    ax.plot([left_x-size*0.4, left_x-size*0.4], [y-height/2, y+height/2], 
            'k-', linewidth=1, zorder=2)
    
    # 不均匀的奇异值（柱状图）
    singular_values_before = [0.4, 0.3, 0.15, 0.08]
    colors_before = ['#FF6B6B', '#FFA06B', '#FFD06B', '#FFE56B']
    bar_width = 0.12
    for i, (sv, color) in enumerate(zip(singular_values_before, colors_before)):
        x_bar = left_x - size*0.25 + i*bar_width
        rect = Rectangle((x_bar, y-height/2), bar_width*0.8, sv*height,
                        facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1, zorder=3)
        ax.add_patch(rect)
    
    ax.text(left_x, y+height/2+0.1, '分散的谱', ha='center', fontsize=8, 
            style='italic', color='red')
    
    # 中间箭头
    arrow = FancyArrowPatch((left_x+size*0.5, y), (x+size*0.3, y),
                           arrowstyle='->', color='blue',
                           linewidth=2.5, mutation_scale=20, zorder=1)
    ax.add_patch(arrow)
    ax.text(x, y+height/2+0.25, 'NS Iter', ha='center', fontsize=9,
            fontweight='bold', color='blue',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightblue', alpha=0.7))
    
    # 右侧：归一化后的谱
    right_x = x + width/3
    # 绘制坐标轴
    ax.plot([right_x-size*0.4, right_x+size*0.4], [y-height/2, y-height/2], 
            'k-', linewidth=1, zorder=2)
    ax.plot([right_x-size*0.4, right_x-size*0.4], [y-height/2, y+height/2], 
            'k-', linewidth=1, zorder=2)
    
    # 归一化的奇异值（都接近1）
    singular_values_after = [0.38, 0.37, 0.36, 0.35]
    colors_after = ['#4ECDC4', '#4ECDC4', '#4ECDC4', '#4ECDC4']
    for i, (sv, color) in enumerate(zip(singular_values_after, colors_after)):
        x_bar = right_x - size*0.25 + i*bar_width
        rect = Rectangle((x_bar, y-height/2), bar_width*0.8, sv*height,
                        facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1, zorder=3)
        ax.add_patch(rect)
    
    # 绘制目标线 (σ=1)
    ax.plot([right_x-size*0.3, right_x+size*0.3], [y+height/2-0.05, y+height/2-0.05],
            'g--', linewidth=2, zorder=2, label='σ=1')
    
    ax.text(right_x, y+height/2+0.1, '归一化的谱', ha='center', fontsize=8,
            style='italic', color='green')
    ax.text(right_x+size*0.35, y+height/2-0.05, 'σ≈1', ha='left', fontsize=7,
            color='green', fontweight='bold')

def draw_adamw_moment(ax, x, y, size=0.4):
    """绘制AdamW二阶矩图标"""
    rect = FancyBboxPatch((x-size*0.6, y-size*0.5), size*1.2, size,
                          boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
                          facecolor='#FFECB3', edgecolor='#FF6F00', 
                          linewidth=2, linestyle='--', zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    ax.text(x, y+0.05, r'$v_t
```, ha='center', fontsize=11, 
            fontweight='bold', color='#E65100', zorder=3)
    ax.text(x, y-0.2, 'Adam', ha='center', fontsize=8, 
            style='italic', color='#E65100', zorder=3)

def draw_cross(ax, x, y, size=0.3, color='red'):
    """绘制叉号表示不需要"""
    linewidth = 3
    ax.plot([x-size/2, x+size/2], [y-size/2, y+size/2], 
            color=color, linewidth=linewidth, zorder=4)
    ax.plot([x-size/2, x+size/2], [y+size/2, y-size/2], 
            color=color, linewidth=linewidth, zorder=4)

def draw_precondition_effect(ax, x, y, size=0.5):
    """绘制预处理效果：椭圆->圆"""
    # 椭圆（未预处理）
    ellipse = Ellipse((x-size*0.7, y), size*0.4, size*0.25, 
                     facecolor='#FFCDD2', edgecolor='red', linewidth=2, zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(ellipse)
    ax.text(x-size*0.7, y-size*0.35, '病态', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='red')
    
    # 箭头
    ax.annotate('', xy=(x-size*0.2, y), xytext=(x-size*0.4, y),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', lw=2, color='blue'))
    ax.text(x-size*0.3, y+size*0.3, r'$L^{-1/4}, R^{-1/4}
```, 
            ha='center', fontsize=7, color='blue')
    
    # 圆（预处理后）
    circle = Circle((x+size*0.2, y), size*0.2, 
                   facecolor='#C8E6C9', edgecolor='green', linewidth=2, zorder=2)
    ax.add_patch(circle)
    ax.text(x+size*0.2, y-size*0.35, '良好', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='green')

# ==================== Muon (第一行) ====================

```

**关键改进：**

1. **谱归一化可视化** - 用柱状图展示：
   - 左侧：不均匀的奇异值分布（红色，高度不同）
   - 右侧：归一化后的奇异值（青色，都接近1）
   - 绿色虚线标记目标值 σ=1

2. **预处理效果** - 用几何形状展示：
   - 椭圆（红色）→ 圆（绿色）
   - 表示从"病态"到"良好"的条件数改善

3. **三个方法的区别更清晰**：
   - **Muon**: 直接谱归一化，不管条件数
   - **Soap**: 先预处理改善条件数，再用AdamW控制步长
   - **Mousse**: 先预处理改善条件数，再谱归一化，两全其美！

这样是不是更能体现NS迭代的本质？
